mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC drops below 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in unemployment rate above 4.5% indicates weakening labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in high-unemployment regimes exceed 60% positive outcomes despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in CPI inflation and falling federal funds rates create a 'stagflation' environment, causing S&P 500 forward returns to decline over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in co-occurring CPI/FEDFUNDS signals are positive in >60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production below its 12-month moving average signals weakening supply chain activity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in INDPRO contraction regimes exceed 60% positive outcomes.

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly payroll growth above 150k signals robust labor market demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in high-payroll growth periods are negative in >40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in housing starts above 1.3 million units indicates expanding demand for construction, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in high-housing-start regimes are negative in >40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and retail sales forecasts a strong economic expansion, causing S&P 500 forward returns to rise over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in co-occurring GDP/retail sales growth periods are negative in >40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in CPI inflation below 1.5% signals deflationary risk, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in low-inflation regimes exceed 60% positive outcomes.
